content: Hi, I'm Dana, nice to meet you. I've been running my own wedding planning agency for a few years now and I'm always looking for ways to improve my business using technology.
Nice to meet you too, Dana. Congratulations on your agency, that's a big undertaking. What kind of technology are you currently using to manage your business?
I'm using a project management tool to keep track of my weddings and a social media scheduler to manage my online presence. I've also been using a CRM to keep track of my clients and vendors.

Those are all great tools to have. Project management and CRM software can be very helpful in keeping your business organized. Have you considered any other tech tools, such as a website builder or an email marketing platform?
I've been thinking about building a new website, my current one is a bit outdated. I've also been trying to get into surfing in my free time, it's a great way to relax.

Surfing is a great hobby, it can be very exhilarating. A new website can be a big project, but it's a great way to improve your online presence. What kind of features are you looking for in a website builder?
I'm looking for something user-friendly and customizable. I've also been knitting in my free time, it's a great way to unwind.

Knitting is a great hobby, it can be very therapeutic. User-friendly and customizable are great features to look for in a website builder. Have you considered any specific website builders, such as Wix or Squarespace?
I've been looking at both of those options, as well as a few others. I've also been thinking about starting a travel blog, I love writing and photography.
A travel blog is a great idea, it can be a wonderful way to share your experiences and connect with others. What kind of content are you thinking of featuring on your blog?
I'm thinking of featuring stories and photos from my travels, as well as tips and advice for other travelers. I've also been taking online courses to improve my writing and photography skills.
That's great, continuing education is important for any field. What kind of online courses have you been taking?

I've been taking courses on creative writing and photography. I've also been thinking about offering online courses on wedding planning, I think it could be a great way to share my expertise and connect with others.
That's a great idea, online courses can be a wonderful way to share your knowledge and skills. What kind of topics would you cover in your courses?
I would cover topics such as wedding planning basics, vendor management, and timeline creation. I think it would be really helpful for couples who are planning their own weddings.
That sounds like a great idea, I'm sure it would be very helpful for couples. If you need any help with creating your online courses, don't hesitate to reach out.
